race.comment: GOLD ARMOUR (4) found the line nicely on debut to finish runner-up then again wound up strongly last time for a close-up fourth. Extra trip a plus and has upside. Worth following up. UP TO TORI (11) has had a few chances but is close to a win. Near miss fresh then not far away over a similar journey last time. Was very fizzed up before the race and fractious at the gates but will strip fitter again. Best form stacks up nicely and deserves another chance. BRUNY BOY (1)  was double figure odds at debut but sat handy and fought on well to finish third. Has upside and cam measure up this time. NICALBI (8) is on the quick back-up and back up in trip but best figures stack up.Drops in weight. GOLD TIANNA (5) looks nicely placed and should be tough to stop late.
